execute_steps: code_review: ProviderModal.vue L393 — chevron Button with @click='toggleExpand(model.id)' controls expandedModels Set
code_review: ThinkingLevelConfig.vue L76-86 — v-for='(item, idx) in levels' renders 7 rows (ALL_THINKING_LEVELS = off/minimal/low/medium/high/xhigh/max)
code_review: toggleExpand adds/removes model.id from expandedModels Set; ThinkingLevelConfig shown only when expandedModels.has(model.id)
test_execution.evidence: v-for遍历levels数组(7项来自ALL_THINKING_LEVELS)，展开时显示，折叠时v-if=false

execute_steps: code_review: ThinkingLevelConfig.vue onToggle(idx) — levels.value[idx].enabled = !levels.value[idx].enabled
code_review: L85 — :disabled='!item.enabled' binds Input disabled state to enabled flag
code_review: L81 — :class='item.enabled ? "text-foreground" : "text-muted"' toggles label color
test_execution.evidence: Toggle切换enabled属性，Input的disabled绑定和label颜色绑定均正确

execute_steps: code_review: ThinkingLevelConfig.vue initLevels(undefined) — map为undefined时走默认分支
code_review: ALL_THINKING_LEVELS.forEach(level => { enabled: true, apiValue: '' }) — 所有7个level默认ON+空
code_review: ThinkingLevelConfig.vue onInput(idx, value) — levels.value[idx].apiValue = value
code_review: L84 — :model-value='item.apiValue' 显示当前值，@update:model-value='onInput(idx, $event)' 更新值
code_review: selfEmitting flag prevents watch re-init from own emit
code_review: ThinkingLevelConfig.vue applyPreset('deepseek') — L82-94
code_review: off/minimal/low/medium → enabled=false, apiValue=''
code_review: high → enabled=true, apiValue='high'
code_review: xhigh → enabled=true, apiValue='max'
code_review: max → enabled=true, apiValue='max'
test_execution.evidence: DeepSeek预设逻辑与spec AC-6完全一致

execute_steps: code_review: ThinkingLevelConfig.vue applyPreset('all-on') — L95-98
code_review: forEach(item => { item.enabled = true; item.apiValue = '' })
code_review: buildMap() with all ON+empty → hasNonTrivial=false → returns undefined
test_execution.evidence: 全开预设将所有level设为ON+空，buildMap返回undefined（不写入models.json）

execute_steps: code_review: ThinkingLevelConfig.buildMap() → OFF level gets null, ON+value gets value string
code_review: ProviderModal emit('save', { models: modalModels }) — modalModels contains thinkingLevelMap
code_review: ProviderPane.handleSave receives data.models with thinkingLevelMap
code_review: useProvider.setProvider sends WS { type: 'config.setProvider', payload: { models } }
code_review: ConfigService.setProvider — isValidThinkingLevelMap() guard + { ...base, id } merge preserves existing fields
build: cd src-electron && npm run build → backend CJS Build success
test_execution.evidence: 完整data flow链路验证通过：buildMap→emit→handleSave→WS→ConfigService→upsertProvider。后端构建成功。

execute_steps: code_review: ThinkingLevelConfig.buildMap() — all ON+empty → no entries in map → hasNonTrivial=false → returns undefined
code_review: ConfigService.setProvider — isValidThinkingLevelMap(undefined) → false → no thinkingLevelMap written
code_review: undefined also triggers the else branch — if base had thinkingLevelMap, delete model.thinkingLevelMap removes it
test_execution.evidence: 全透传场景：buildMap返回undefined → ConfigService不写入 → models.json无thinkingLevelMap字段

execute_steps: code_review: InputToolbar.vue L47 — if (!model.reasoning) return [] — reasoning preserved by { ...base } merge in ConfigService
code_review: InputToolbar.vue L50-59 — thinkingLevelMap filtering: null→excluded, undefined→included, string→mapped
code_review: buildMap() serialization matches InputToolbar deserialization — null=OFF, undefined=passthrough, string=mapped
test_execution.evidence: InputToolbar过滤逻辑与buildMap序列化格式完全兼容。reasoning字段在{...base}merge后保留。

execute_steps: code_review: ProviderPane.handleSave try-catch wraps setProvider() call
code_review: setProvider() calls send() which is fire-and-forget WS — does not throw on disconnect
identified: WS fire-and-forget pattern means try-catch cannot catch async failures
test_execution.evidence: AC-4部分满足：try-catch存在但WS fire-and-forget使同步catch无效。BLR review已标记为LOW-1。

execute_steps: review_evidence: BLR v2 review confirmed this is a known architectural limitation (LOW-1)
review_evidence: The current error handling is the best achievable without adding WS response tracking
acceptance: This LOW issue was accepted by all reviewers (BLR v1/v2, Integration v1) as pre-existing architecture constraint
test_execution.evidence: Known limitation accepted across all reviews. AC-4 partially met — try-catch present, but WS async error propagation requires architectural changes beyond this PR scope.
